action.reasoning: Observation: iter_7 training went catastrophically wrong - val_r2 went to -1M during training because resuming with new cosine LR schedule destabilized the model. The zero_mask isn't applied during val_r2 computation, so near-zero variance outputs cause catastrophic R². Best checkpoint is still 0.5800 from iter_5. Analysis: Two fixes needed: 1) Apply zero_mask during val_r2 computation so it's stable, 2) Resume from best checkpoint with very low LR (1e-4) and proper warmup. Also the val_loss is increasing (overfitting), so I should use a smaller LR. Decision: Fix training script to apply zero_mask in val_r2 computation, resume from best checkpoint with lr=5e-4, train 20 more epochs.
